title: Add call graph relationships to context for planning
goal: Enable MCP server to understand function-to-function call relationships for better planning
requirements: Add callGraph field to ProjectContext interface
Show which critical functions call which others
Output call graph in both JSON and Markdown formats
constraints: Only analyze relationships between critical functions (not all elements)
Must use existing state.graph data structure
Parallel safe with IMP-CORE-024 (different context fields)
out_of_scope: MCP server export changes (covered by IMP-CORE-029)
related_workorders: IMP-CORE-024: Improve context generator for AI planning
